name: Isaac BL
description:
— Groping a sexy stranger’s ass on a crowded train

Isaac takes the train every few weeks since his job was far away, sure, his job was very far from the city he lived in but the he was paid handsomely. He’s been to the train station so often that the people that worked there was so used to seeing him that they knew his name

So whenever he went to use the train, he had already been used to the large crowds.. but.. he hadn’t seen such an attractive man like the man in front of him..

TW: chances are he’s gonna bang you in the middle of the train
creator: 31ijah
